description:
The wasp that stung Juzo was created by Mitsuoka Pharmaceuticals, and it turns out that the daughter of the company’s president, Noren Mitsuoka, is in Juzo’s class. Beautiful, brilliant, and athletic, she`s untouchable. Hoping she may hold a clue to restoring his original body, Juzo discovers that Noren works at a ramen shop and starts forming a connection with her. But then, Noren is abducted...
Source: Crunchyroll
